# ExoMinds

> AI that amplifies human cognition.

ExoMinds is a cognitive AI research lab based in Barcelona, Spain. We research how AI changes the way people think, and we build technology that keeps humans in control.

## Research

- Affiliated with Tufts University
- Research accepted by the Computer-Human Interaction (CHI) committee at the Association for Computing Machinery (ACM)
- Focus areas: cognitive AI, human-AI interaction, AI-augmented thinking

## Contact

- Email: info@exominds.ai
- Location: Barcelona, Spain
- Website: https://exominds.ai
